scripts.db:generate: if [ -d ../packages/db ]; then cd ../packages/db; elif [ -d ./packages/db ]; then cd ./packages/db; else echo 'packages/db not found, skip prisma generate'; exit 0; fi; bunx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: if [ -d ../packages/db ]; then cd ../packages/db; elif [ -d ./packages/db ]; then cd ./packages/db; else echo 'packages/db not found, skip prisma migrate'; exit 0; fi; bunx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.postinstall: if [ -d ../packages/db ]; then cd ../packages/db; elif [ -d ./packages/db ]; then cd ./packages/db; else echo 'packages/db not found, skip postinstall db setup'; exit 0; fi; bun install && bunx prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
